form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months ran last of 9 at Pakenham 0 - 66 on April 2 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Silver Bullet with 57.5kg at $19. Previously second-up came from midfield and won by 1.0 len at Kilmore Bm56 October 31 over 1612m defeating Summer Night with 61.5kg at $6. This a sharp drop in class on first-up run and has twice won second up previously.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 14 at Ballarat Bm56 on February 14 over 1400m, 4 len behind Simply Outrageous with 59.5kg at $26. Last start 7th of 10 at Terang Bm56 on March 17 over 1406m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Eleanor Dumont carrying 59.5kg at $12. Fitter now and suited up in trip.
